sections.createYourOwnDescription: Use AI agents to automatically create custom assistants trained on WAI-WAY methodology

faqs.a: Ship when all critical bugs are fixed and MVP features work. Don't wait for perfection—iterate after launch.

faqs.q: What counts as a critical bug?
faqs.a: Anything that causes crashes, data loss, security issues, or breaks core functionality. Minor UI glitches are acceptable.

faqs.q: Can FINISHER refactor code while fixing bugs?
faqs.a: No! FINISHER should make minimal changes only. Refactoring introduces new risks. Fix the bug, nothing more.

faqs.q: How do I write good bug reports?
faqs.a: Include: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior, error messages, and context (page, user role, browser).

faqs.q: What if fixes break other things?
faqs.a: FINISHER should check for regressions. Test related functionality after each fix to ensure nothing else broke.
